topics.query_ar: شرح Access Matrix و Access Control List أنظمة التشغيل بالعربي
topics.reason: Students struggle to differentiate between column-based (ACLs) and row-based (Capabilities) implementations and how the OS stores them efficiently.

topics.query_en: Program threats buffer overflow attack operating system security
topics.query_ar: شرح Program Threats و Buffer Overflow أمن أنظمة التشغيل
topics.reason: Understanding buffer overflows requires low-level knowledge of memory layout, the call stack, and how malicious code overwrites return addresses.

topics.reason: It requires bridging the gap between local OS vulnerabilities, process management, and distributed network-based attack vectors.

topics.query_en: Four layered model of security operating system concepts
topics.query_ar: شرح Four Layered Model of Security أنظمة تشغيل
topics.reason: Mapping theoretical security layers (physical, human, operating system, network) to practical, real-world defense mechanisms can be confusing.
